prompt:
[JC:SYSTEM SCOPE]
You are the [JC:Architecture Agent] identifying Software Domains for Sub-Phase 4.1.

GOVERNING CONSTRAINTS (apply without exception):
(none)

Identify [JC:Software Domains] — cohesive groupings of related business logic within the System Boundary, each with its own [JC:Ubiquitous Language].

REQUIRED OUTPUT: A JSON object matching the `software_domains` schema:
- domains: array, each with:
  - id, name, ubiquitous_language (array of {term, definition}), system_requirement_ids

Rules:
- Each domain should have a clear bounded context
- Ubiquitous language terms must be unambiguous within the domain
- Do NOT use terms from the JanumiCode Canonical Vocabulary as domain terms

CONTEXT:
System Boundary: PROJECT TYPE: Consumer Discovery MVP (Phase 1 Focus): Implementation focused exclusively on Pillar 1 (Home Real Property Assistant) to prioritize user acquisition, property data ingestion (images, 3D splats), and service provider matching for individual homeowners.
Capabilities: Property Asset Ingestion (Images & 3D Splats); AI Agent Service Provider Search & Matching; Bid Estimate Comparison UI (Good-Better-Best); CC&R & Bylaws AI Extraction Module; Action Items Workflow Management (System of Action); Statutory Deadline Tracking & Alert Engine; Mass Email/SMS Communication Channel; Mobile App Client (Offline Queueing); Multi-tenant Security & Authorization (RLS); Payment Processing Integration (Stripe/Square); High-Performance Bun API Backend; SvelteKit Frontend Portal; DBOS Versioned Workflow Engine; Media Asset Storage (SeaweedFS); Regulatory Rules Engine (Notice Requirements)
Excluded: Pillar 2 (Financials) implementation for this MVP; Pillar 3 (Accounting) implementation for this MVP; Enterprise Governance MVP features (Phase 3 Focus); Field Service Engine MVP features (Phase 2 Focus); Automated Homeowner Association (HOA) Voting modules (Phase 3); Full offline-first capabilities for Homeowners (Secondary priority); Legacy Vantaca integration for V1 (Replicate 'System of Action' only); Advanced AI extraction beyond CC&Rs/Bylaws for V1; Direct Contractor Portal Access for V1; Real-time Bid Aggregation for non-homeowners

In scope: Property Asset Ingestion (Images & 3D Splats); AI Agent Service Provider Search & Matching; Bid Estimate Comparison UI (Good-Better-Best); CC&R & Bylaws AI Extraction Module; Action Items Workflow Management (System of Action); Statutory Deadline Tracking & Alert Engine; Mass Email/SMS Communication Channel; Mobile App Client (Offline Queueing); Multi-tenant Security & Authorization (RLS); Payment Processing Integration (Stripe/Square); High-Performance Bun API Backend; SvelteKit Frontend Portal; DBOS Versioned Workflow Engine; Media Asset Storage (SeaweedFS); Regulatory Rules Engine (Notice Requirements)
Out of scope: Pillar 2 (Financials) implementation for this MVP; Pillar 3 (Accounting) implementation for this MVP; Enterprise Governance MVP features (Phase 3 Focus); Field Service Engine MVP features (Phase 2 Focus); Automated Homeowner Association (HOA) Voting modules (Phase 3); Full offline-first capabilities for Homeowners (Secondary priority); Legacy Vantaca integration for V1 (Replicate 'System of Action' only); Advanced AI extraction beyond CC&Rs/Bylaws for V1; Direct Contractor Portal Access for V1; Real-time Bid Aggregation for non-homeowners
External systems: EXT-001: Payment Gateway (Stripe/Square) (API/Webhook); EXT-002: Communication Provider (Email/SMS) (API/Webhook); EXT-003: Government Regulatory Services (API); EXT-004: AI/ML Service Provider (REST API); EXT-005: Mobile OS SDKs (SDK/Native)
System Requirements: 10 System Requirements:
  SR-001 [critical]: The system shall accept property image and 3D asset data uploads under 10MB in formats .png, .jpg, and .gltf, rejecting invalid formats with specific error codes, returning a '200 OK' status for valid files within 5 seconds and indexing assets within 10 seconds post-upload. (traces to: ["US-001","AC-001-1","AC-001-2"])
  SR-002 [high]: The system shall utilize AI Agent processing to return service provider search results with relevance scores within 300ms after query, displaying the top 5 providers and restricting category filters to 'Home Real Property' only. (traces to: ["US-002","AC-002-1","AC-002-2"])
  SR-003 [high]: The system shall render a bid estimate comparison table with 'Good-Better-Best' columns for service providers, requiring a minimum of 3 bid entries to render the view. (traces to: ["US-003","AC-003-1"])
  SR-004 [medium]: The system shall extract and display CC&R and Bylaws clauses using AI analysis, generating an 'Extracted Clauses' view with text having a confidence score greater than 90% and highlighting relevant sections. (traces to: ["US-004","AC-004-1"])
  SR-005 [critical]: The system shall manage service action item workflows using a versioned engine, recording state transitions in an audit log with 100ms timestamp precision and reflecting status updates (Pending, In-Progress, Complete) immediately in the UI. (traces to: ["US-005","AC-005-1"])
  SR-006 [high]: The system shall monitor statutory deadlines and trigger email/SMS notifications 30 days before the deadline, saving notification payloads to an offline queue that resumes delivery attempts within 2 hours upon reconnection and confirms receipt. (traces to: ["US-006","AC-006-1","AC-006-2"])
  SR-007 [medium]: The system shall process mass email/SMS batches for meeting notices and violation alerts, completing message processing for 1,000 recipients within 2 minutes and tracking bounce rates in the dashboard. (traces to: ["US-007","AC-007-1"])
  SR-008 [high]: The mobile application client shall allow data capture via camera and text entry without a network connection, ensuring data integrity and successful synchronization upon reconnection with no data loss. (traces to: ["US-008","AC-008-1"])
  SR-009 [critical]: The system shall enforce multi-tenant security and Row-Level Security (RLS), returning a '403 Forbidden' response within 50ms for any unauthorized access attempts to restricted tenant data. (traces to: ["US-009","AC-009-1"])
  SR-010 [medium]: The system shall process payments for deposits and service fees via integrated payment gateway, receiving authorization responses within 5 seconds and generating and emailing receipts within 1 minute of confirmation. (traces to: ["US-010","AC-010-1"])
